name: Dave from Nebraska
text: I bought a homepage and now my mom finally believes I have a real job.

name: Brenda K.
text: I didn't even need a homepage but the peer pressure was immense. 10/10.

name: Anonymous (not suspicious)
text: This homepage changed my life. Also I am definitely a real human person.

name: Chad Thunderton III
text: I showed my homepage to my therapist. She said 'Chad, this is a website.' Exactly.

name: Susan from the Internet
text: I asked for a homepage. They gave me FOUR DIVS and a button. I've never been happier.

name: Kevin
text: My dog clicked on my homepage once. We bonded.
